title: Compliance
full_text:
7.1.1.3 Compliance
Compliance
1) Compliance with this Part shall be achieved by following
  a) the prescriptive path described in Section 7.2., or
  b) the performance path described in Section 7.4. (see Note A-3.1.1.3.(1)(c)).
(See Note A-7.1.1.3.(1).)

sentences.text: Compliance with this Part shall be achieved by following

clauses.text: the prescriptive path described in Section 7.2., or
the performance path described in Section 7.4. (see Note A-3.1.1.3.(1)(c)). (See Note A-7.1.1.3.(1).)
